text:
Europe is a landmass connected to Asia which sometimes shown in various Evangelion continuities. Europe is largely shown in Rebuild of Evangelion and little in Neon Genesis Evangelion.

Notable Locations

NERV 3rd Branch - Located in Germany, where Asuka was trained as an Evangelion pilot. Also where Kaji was stationed before the events of Neon Genesis Evangelion. Germany remained one of the few countries capable of producing an Evangelion, having had a large and complex economy.

Bethany Base - In northern Europe/Russia and where the Third Angel was sealed in Rebuild of Evangelion.

Euro-NERV - European NERV in Rebuild of Evangelion.

NERV Germany - Germany Branch of NERV in Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA.

Notable People

Ryoji Kaji - Stationed in 3rd Branch of NERV
Asuka Langley Sohryu - Evangelion pilot born and trained in Germany.
Asuka Shikinami Langley - Evangelion pilot born and trained in Germany.
Mari Makinami Illustrious - Evangelion pilot born in Great Britain.
Kyoko Zeppelin Sohryu - A scientist in the German division of Gehirn and the mother of Asuka Langley Sohryu.
Kyoko Zeppelin Sohryu - Former member of Europe's Evangelion Research Institute and the mother of Asuka Langley Sohryu.
Lieutenant Colonel Clausewitz - NERV Germany Commander
